title: Search And Delete Emails - Gmail
content:
This playbook searches Gmail to identify and delete emails with similar attributes to the malicious email.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Cortex XSOAR pack (Gmail, xsoar-supported).

Inputs — From: The value of the malicious email's "From" attribute.; Subject: The value of the malicious email's "Subject" attribute.; AttachmentName: The value of the malicious email's "AttachmentName" attribute.; Limit: The maximum number of search results.; DeleteType: The deletion type (trash or permanent).
For permanent choose 'True'.; SearchThisWeek: Limit the search to the current week (true/false)..

Integrations/scripts used: GetTime, Set, gmail-delete-mail, gmail-search-all-mailboxes.
raw_yaml:
id: Search And Delete Emails - Gmail
version: -1
contentitemexportablefields:
  contentitemfields: {}
name: Search And Delete Emails - Gmail
description: This playbook searches Gmail to identify and delete emails with similar attributes to the malicious email.

      script: '|||gmail-search-all-mailboxes'

      iscommand: true
      brand: ""

      script: '|||gmail-delete-mail'

view: |-

      "12_5_Yes": 0.44,
      "12_8_#default#": 0.46,

        "x": 100,
        "y": 60
      }
    }

inputs:

- key: DeleteType

- key: SearchThisWeek

  required: false
